title.en: A Framework for OFAC Compliance Commitments

summary.zh: 企业建立制裁合规体系时的基础框架，强调管理层承诺、风险评估、内部控制、测试审计和培训五个支柱。适合用于海外子公司、销售渠道和第三方付款控制。
summary.en: A baseline sanctions compliance framework built around management commitment, risk assessment, internal controls, testing and auditing, and training. Useful for overseas subsidiaries, sales channels, and third-party payment controls.

useCase.zh: 制裁筛查、第三方尽调、付款审批和董事会合规报告模板。
useCase.en: Sanctions screening, third-party diligence, payment approval, and board reporting.

summary.zh: 出口管制合规的实务框架，强调管理层支持、风险评估、分类、最终用途和最终用户筛查、记录保存、培训、审计和整改。
summary.en: A practical export-control compliance framework covering management support, risk assessment, classification, end-use and end-user screening, recordkeeping, training, auditing, and remediation.

useCase.zh: 半导体、AI、无人机、传感器、云服务和双用途产品出口/再出口管理。
useCase.en: Export and re-export control for semiconductors, AI, drones, sensors, cloud services, and dual-use products.

title.zh: 美国司法部公司合规项目评估

summary.zh: 美国执法机关判断企业合规项目是否有效的核心文件，重点关注风险导向、资源配置、数据使用、第三方管理、并购整合和持续改进。
summary.en: A central document for how U.S. prosecutors assess corporate compliance programs, focusing on risk orientation, resources, data use, third-party management, M&A integration, and continuous improvement.

useCase.zh: 搭建集团合规体系、调查整改、并购后整合和自愿披露评估。
useCase.en: Group compliance design, investigation remediation, post-acquisition integration, and voluntary disclosure assessment.

summary.zh: 供应链强迫劳动执法中的证据包参考，列明进口商需要准备的交易、生产、运输、供应商和劳工材料。
summary.en: A reference for evidence packages in forced-labour enforcement, identifying transaction, production, shipping, supplier, and labour documentation expected from importers.

useCase.zh: 供应链地图、原产地证明、采购合同、物料清单、运输链和供应商审计。
useCase.en: Supply-chain mapping, origin proof, purchase contracts, bills of materials, shipping chain, and supplier audits.

title.zh: 负责任商业行为尽职调查指南
title.en: Due Diligence Guidance for Responsible Business Conduct

summary.zh: 适用于跨国供应链ESG、人权、劳工、环境和申诉机制的通用尽调框架，可与欧盟CSDDD、强迫劳动和可持续报告要求衔接。
summary.en: A general due-diligence framework for ESG, human rights, labour, environment, and grievance mechanisms across multinational supply chains, useful alongside CSDDD, forced-labour, and sustainability-reporting obligations.

useCase.zh: 供应商行为准则、申诉机制、风险分级、整改计划和利益相关方沟通。
useCase.en: Supplier codes, grievance mechanisms, risk tiering, remediation plans, and stakeholder engagement.

title.zh: 欧盟企业可持续尽职调查指令实务入口
title.en: EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive practice portal

summary.zh: 欧盟CSDDD要求大型企业在自身运营、子公司和活动链中识别、预防、减轻和终止人权及环境不利影响，中企作为供应商或欧盟市场经营者都可能受到间接或直接影响。
summary.en: The CSDDD requires large companies to identify, prevent, mitigate, and end adverse human-rights and environmental impacts in operations, subsidiaries, and chains of activities; Chinese firms may be affected as suppliers or EU market operators.

useCase.zh: 欧盟客户问卷、合同保证、供应链分级、环境和人权整改路线图。
useCase.en: EU customer questionnaires, contractual assurances, supplier tiering, and environmental and human-rights remediation roadmaps.

title.zh: 世界银行制裁体系与采购合规
title.en: World Bank sanctions system and procurement compliance

summary.zh: 对参与多边开发银行项目的承包商尤其重要，涉及欺诈、腐败、串通、胁迫和妨碍调查等禁止行为以及交叉制裁风险。
summary.en: Especially important for contractors in multilateral development bank projects, covering fraud, corruption, collusion, coercion, obstruction, and cross-debarment risk.

useCase.zh: 工程承包、代理商管理、投标文件真实性、调查配合和和解整改。
useCase.en: Construction contracting, agent management, tender integrity, investigation cooperation, and settlement remediation.

title.zh: 金杜：企业出海与全球合规实务文章
title.en: KWM: going-global and global compliance insights

summary.zh: 金杜持续发布关于对外投资、供应链、关税、税务、数据、出口管制和跨境交易的实务文章，适合作为中国企业法务和外部律师的中文实务阅读入口。
summary.en: KWM regularly publishes Chinese-language practice pieces on outbound investment, supply chains, tariffs, tax, data, export controls, and cross-border transactions.

useCase.zh: 跟踪中国律师对最新对外投资规则、关税和供应链合规的实务解读。
useCase.en: Track Chinese counsel analysis of outbound investment rules, tariffs, and supply-chain compliance.

title.zh: 君合：出海、出口管制、数据与跨境交易法律动态
title.en: JunHe: overseas expansion, export controls, data, and cross-border transaction updates

summary.zh: 君合法律动态中包含技术出海、跨境数据、制裁出口管制、并购和争议解决等文章，适合关注规则变化后的交易文件和内部控制调整。
summary.en: JunHe legal updates cover technology going global, cross-border data, sanctions and export controls, M&A, and dispute resolution, useful for transaction documents and internal-control adjustments.

useCase.zh: 技术企业出海、跨境数据方案、并购审批和争议应对。
useCase.en: Technology expansion, cross-border data plans, M&A approvals, and dispute response.

title.zh: 中伦：企业出海、数据合规和国际贸易救济研究
title.en: Zhong Lun: overseas expansion, data compliance, and international trade remedies research

summary.zh: 中伦研究栏目长期覆盖企业出海、数据跨境、反垄断、国际贸易救济、工程承包和争端解决，适合做专题实务检索。
summary.en: Zhong Lun's research library covers going global, data transfers, antitrust, trade remedies, construction projects, and dispute resolution.

useCase.zh: 从交易、监管和争议角度搭建出海项目法律备忘录。
useCase.en: Build legal memoranda for overseas projects from transaction, regulatory, and dispute angles.

title.zh: 汉坤：科技企业出海、数据和资本市场实务
title.en: Han Kun: technology expansion, data, and capital markets practice

summary.zh: 汉坤文章适合关注平台、AI、生命科学、跨境数据、境外上市和投融资的企业，用于连接产品合规、融资披露和海外运营。
summary.en: Han Kun materials are useful for platform, AI, life-sciences, cross-border data, overseas listing, and financing issues, linking product compliance, disclosure, and operations.

useCase.zh: AI/平台产品出海、境外上市问询、数据跨境和投资审查准备。
useCase.en: AI and platform product launch, overseas listing queries, data transfers, and investment-screening preparation.

title.zh: 方达：跨境交易、反垄断和监管调查实务
title.en: Fangda: cross-border transactions, antitrust, and regulatory investigation practice

summary.zh: 方达观点和文章可用于跟踪跨境并购、反垄断、争议解决、资本市场和监管调查实务。
summary.en: Fangda insights support research on cross-border M&A, antitrust, dispute resolution, capital markets, and regulatory investigations.

useCase.zh: 交易结构设计、反垄断申报、争议策略和监管问询回应。
useCase.en: Transaction structuring, antitrust filings, dispute strategy, and regulator query responses.

title.zh: 大成：一带一路、工程承包与跨境合规文章
title.en: Dentons Dacheng: BRI, construction, and cross-border compliance insights

summary.zh: 大成的全球网络和中文实务文章适合工程承包、境外投资、争议解决、制裁出口管制和地区合规检索。
summary.en: Dentons Dacheng's global network and Chinese practice materials are useful for construction, overseas investment, dispute resolution, sanctions, export controls, and local compliance.

useCase.zh: 工程项目合规、东道国法律检索、争议预案和多法域律师协同。
useCase.en: Project compliance, host-state law research, dispute planning, and multi-jurisdiction counsel coordination.

title.zh: Baker McKenzie：全球制裁、贸易、税务和数据合规实务
title.en: Baker McKenzie: global sanctions, trade, tax, and data compliance insights

summary.zh: 跨国律所视角适合中企对照欧盟、美国、英国和亚太规则，尤其适用于制裁、海关、税务、数据和全球雇佣问题。
summary.en: A multinational-law-firm perspective for comparing EU, U.S., UK, and Asia-Pacific rules, especially sanctions, customs, tax, data, and global employment issues.

useCase.zh: 多法域规则对照、集团政策本地化和跨国调查协作。
useCase.en: Multi-jurisdiction comparison, localization of group policies, and cross-border investigation coordination.

title.zh: Clifford Chance：外资审查、金融监管和争端实务
title.en: Clifford Chance: foreign investment screening, financial regulation, and disputes insights

summary.zh: 适合关注欧盟、英国和美国国家安全审查、金融监管、制裁、争端和能源转型投资的企业法务团队。
summary.en: Useful for legal teams tracking EU, UK, and U.S. national-security screening, financial regulation, sanctions, disputes, and energy-transition investment.

useCase.zh: 并购可行性评估、交易文件条件设置、监管沟通和争端升级。
useCase.en: M&A feasibility, transaction conditions, regulator engagement, and dispute escalation.

title.zh: Freshfields：全球监管、反垄断与争议简报
title.en: Freshfields: global regulatory, antitrust, and disputes briefings

summary.zh: 适合跟踪欧盟外资审查、反垄断、供应链、人权尽调、金融制裁和大型跨境争议。
summary.en: Useful for tracking EU FDI screening, antitrust, supply chains, human-rights due diligence, financial sanctions, and major cross-border disputes.

useCase.zh: 欧盟市场准入、监管调查、供应链尽调和跨境诉讼仲裁。
useCase.en: EU market access, regulatory investigations, supply-chain diligence, and cross-border litigation or arbitration.
